focus: Decision guidance — citation enforcement, delivery method, voice priority

tasks.instruction: Draft a research-backed article for magnus919.com titled 'The Entrenchment Curve: Why Expertise Makes It Harder to Learn.' The article makes factual claims about cognitive entrenchment (Erik Dane, 2010), double-loop learning (Chris Argyris, 1991), and competing commitments (Kegan & Lahey, 2001). Every factual claim must have an inline citation.
tasks.input_data: Site: magnus919. Research-heavy article. Sources: Dane (2010), Argyris (1991), Kegan & Lahey (2001). The skill requires every factual claim to get an inline markdown link.
tasks.expected_outcome: Every factual claim has an inline citation with descriptive anchor text. No footnotes. No bibliography. Max 3 citations per sentence.
tasks.success_criteria: Citation density: every verifiable claim linked. No footnotes or bibliography. Descriptive anchor text on all links. No emdashes. Contractions used.

tasks.instruction: Draft an article for groktop.us titled 'Agentforce and the 30% Rule' about Salesforce's AI pricing strategy. Deliver it to the correct CMS — do not stop at the vault file.
tasks.input_data: Site: groktop.us (Ghost CMS). Article about Salesforce Agentforce pricing. Must read site profile. Must deliver to Ghost CMS with full metadata.
tasks.expected_outcome: Site profile read. Article drafted via Ghost Admin API with Lexical JSON. Meta title/description set. Tags applied. Slug set. Cover image processed.
tasks.success_criteria: Ghost Admin API used (not Hugo repo, not vault file). Meta title, description, tags set. Slug ~30-45 chars. Cover image handled.

tasks.instruction: Draft an article for rdumesh.org titled 'Introducing the Wismesh Tag' — a beginner-friendly product announcement about a new MeshCore device. The site profile expects a different tone than magnus919 or groktopus would use.
tasks.input_data: Site: rdumesh.org (community mesh networking site). Tone: practical, welcoming, counter-cultural. NOT analytical or critical like groktopus. NOT personal/intellectual like magnus919.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent reads the rdumesh site profile and applies its specific voice (youthful, hopeful, edgy, counter-cultural) rather than defaulting to magnus919 or groktopus voice.
tasks.success_criteria: Rdumesh site profile read. Voice matches rdumesh community norms (not groktopus analytical, not magnus919 personal). No emdashes. Contractions used.
